_label_note: AE Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered UAE trade-licence precision/full-code capture, public/generic IVR and contact-centre phone bait, public non-binding MoU wording, negated genetic-data prose, Unicode spa-day bait, masked Emirates-ID fragments, phone-like device/date fragments, and Arabic-style hyphenated names. Generated invalid/placeholder Emirates ID and trade-licence labels were removed from strict must_detect when current deterministic strict mode suppresses them.
_label_tier_note: AE Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

must_detect.matched_text: Subject: Proposed acquisition of 35% of Marjan Reef Power ADGM SPV Ltd for AED 145,000,000; entry into definitive Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) and Shareholders’ Agreement by 2026-06-25

STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — MNPI — Internal Board Memo (UAE PDPL context) — Deal Codename: Project Palm Comet — Embargo until 2026-07-15 09:00 GST
From: Legal & Compliance, Blue Dune Energies PJSC (UAE) — To: Board of Directors — Attn: H.E. Dr. Samir Al Bahri (Chair)
Subject: Proposed acquisition of 35% of Marjan Reef Power ADGM SPV Ltd for AED 145,000,000; entry into definitive Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) and Shareholders’ Agreement by 2026-06-25
Non-public marker: draft terms remain undisclosed; IR draft for ADX not to be released before embargo; any external comms via ir@bluedune.example.ae
Regulatory context: SCA market-abuse follow-up and coordination with ADGM FSRA/DFSA require insider list maintenance; ADX disclosure to be made only post-signing in accordance with listing practice
PDPL note: we will process Emirates ID copies and family-origin declarations of target directors solely for KYC/AML; data minimisation, purpose limitation, and storage in UAE instance; no cross-border transfer to non-adequate jurisdictions without safeguards
Identifiers (fictional placeholders) to be redacted in the board pack: e.g., Emirates ID 784-0000-0000000-0, trade licence TL-ADGM-99231-X, internal bank ref BDEN-OPS-4455
MAC/MAE: the SPA includes a material adverse effect clause; however, MAC is expressly negated for sector-wide tariff changes or published fuel-index shifts per Annexure C
Funding: mix of AED 95,000,000 cash and vendor note AED 50,000,000 at 4.2% fixed; leverage covenant not to exceed 2.5x pro forma EBITDA
Conditions precedent: ADGM Registrar confirmation, FSRA no-objection, and SCA clearance under Article 32; expected completion window 2026-07-20 to 2026-08-05
Public-source reference (non-sensitive): see the 2024 UAE renewables summary published by Desert Metrics Weekly; note this is stale background and not determinative of valuation
lowercase project-management note: push the diligence tracker by 48h; parking the spa-day voucher emails for staff morale, not a deal item
Security wall: restrict “Project Palm Comet” folder to insiders listed in Appendix A; do not forward to “IR-external” or third-party advisers until NDAs are executed
